revision.comment: Add title= to easy copy/paste of diff links
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Diff]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:37:57
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}&oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last change to '''Main Page'''}}}}}}] ===Usage=== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2='''cur'''|3=|4='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=cur|3=|4=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}}

revision.comment: allow diff parm to disappear if not filled in, to let a specific revision be cited without diff if desired.
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last revision of '''Main Page'''}}}}}}] ===Usage=== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}}

revision.comment: fixups: more general, less weirdly colored
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}}

revision.comment: +cat
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: adding alias "title" for "label"
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{title|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: made much simpler
Revert to revision 194032435 dated 2008-02-25 22:31:07 by Zetawoof using [[:en:Wikipedia:Tools/Navigation_popups|popups]]
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{title|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: documentation moved to Doc subpage (again). Enclose the code in includeonly tags.
The included part must not contain a newline.
try something
urlencode converts spaces to "+" in url.
simplify, page name not needed
Undo: This prevents NAVPOP from working with the links. See {{[[template:diff2|diff2]]}} though for an easier diff template. Also, breaks on the secure server since {{SERVER}} isn't enough there!
move ''' to proper brace level (test)
probably not supposed to be there
Update from sandbox; now accepts empty title parameter without breaking Popups and links to secure server. No label results in numbered link.
remove additional ampersand per request of Vadmium, tidy whitespace, show output on template
per talk page request
Synch from sandbox; adds diffonly parameter;

The "page" logic branch uses "fullurl" which performs url encoding and ensures the link stays together. The other branch however produces raw wikitext. Use {{trim}} to ensure the link doesn't break early into the label value.
Add title= to easy copy/paste of diff links
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:43:22 on [[Template:Diff]]

try something
urlencode converts spaces to "+" in url.
simplify, page name not needed
Undo: This prevents NAVPOP from working with the links. See {{[[template:diff2|diff2]]}} though for an easier diff template. Also, breaks on the secure server since {{SERVER}} isn't enough there!
move ''' to proper brace level (test)
probably not supposed to be there
Update from sandbox; now accepts empty title parameter without breaking Popups and links to secure server. No label results in numbered link.
remove additional ampersand per request of Vadmium, tidy whitespace, show output on template
per talk page request
Synch from sandbox; adds diffonly parameter;

The "page" logic branch uses "fullurl" which performs url encoding and ensures the link stays together. The other branch however produces raw wikitext. Use {{trim}} to ensure the link doesn't break early into the label value.
Add title= to easy copy/paste of diff links
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:15:46 on [[Template:Diff]]
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}&oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last change to '''Main Page'''}}}}}}] ===Usage=== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2='''cur'''|3=|4='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=cur|3=|4=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}}

revision.comment: allow diff parm to disappear if not filled in, to let a specific revision be cited without diff if desired.
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last revision of '''Main Page'''}}}}}}] ===Usage=== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}}

revision.comment: fixups: more general, less weirdly colored
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}}

revision.comment: +cat
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: adding alias "title" for "label"
revision.text: [{{fullurl:{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}|oldid={{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}}|||&diff={{{diff|{{{2|cur}}}}}}}}}} {{{label|{{{title|{{{4|Last revision of '''{{{page|{{{1|Main Page}}}}}}}}}'''}}}}}}] ==Usage== '''{{diff|1='''''page'''''|2='''''diff'''''|3='''''oldid'''''|4='''''label'''''}}''' ;Current default:'''{{|1='''Main Page'''|2=|3=|4='''Last revision of '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|1=Main Page|2=|3=|4=Last revision of '''Main Page'''}} ;You can also use the named variables "page", "diff", "oldid", and "label".:'''{{diff|page='''Main Page'''|diff='''cur'''|oldid=|label='''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|page=Main Page|diff=cur|oldid=|label=Last change to '''Main Page'''}} ;As long as the values do not contain equals signs, you can skip the variable names/numbers.:'''{{diff|'''Main Page'''|'''cur'''||'''Last change to '''Main Page''''''}}''' → {{diff|Main Page|cur||Last change to '''Main Page'''}} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: made much simpler
documentation moved to Doc subpage (again). Enclose the code in includeonly tags.
The included part must not contain a newline.

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Add title= to easy copy/paste of diff links
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Diff here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [{{#if:{{{title|{{{page|{{{1|}}}}}}}}} |{{fullurl:{{{title|{{{page|{{{1}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}} |diff={{trim|{{{diff|{{{2}}}}}}}}& }}oldid={{trim|{{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}} |{{SERVER}}{{SCRIPTPATH}}/index.php?title={{#if:{{{diff|{{{2|}}}}}} |&diff={{trim|{{{diff|{{{2}}}}}}}} }}&oldid={{trim|{{{oldid|{{{3|}}}}}}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{diffonly|}}}|yes|&diffonly=1}} {{{label|{{{4|}}}}}}] {{documentation}}
